name: Apple-Cheddar Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave or fry bacon until crisp. Drain and reserve drippings.
2. Stir half of the soup into a bowl until smooth. Add eggs and beat well.
3. In a casserole dish, stir remaining soup until smooth. Stir in apple, milk, shredded cheese, and pepper. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 4 minutes or until hot and bubbling. Stir once.
4. Let stand covered while preparing omelets.
5. Brush the bottom of a pie plate with bacon drippings.
6. Pour half of the egg mixture into the pie plate. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes.
7. Using a spatula, gently move the outer edge to the center, allowing the uncooked portion to move to the edge. Microwave for an additional 2 minutes or until set.
8. Fold in half and slide onto a plate. Repeat with remaining bacon drippings and egg mixture.
9. Spoon sauce over each omelet and sprinkle with bacon.
